name: Tiny House, Big Living
overview: Couples learn what it really means to downsize when they take the plunge into the tiny house real estate market. At an average size of only 180 square feet, watch as clients meet with their builders, or decide to build these tiny homes all by themselves, and follow along through the construction process until the house is complete.

trailers.title: Luxurious Amenities | Tiny House, Big Living | HGTV Asia
